content: agent1: working on 'Only change readonly if saved filename matches opened filename' - modifying src/PIL/Image.py save()/_ensure_mutable() logic and Tests/test_image.py. Will touch Image.py's save method.

agent1: done. Fixed save()/_ensure_mutable() to only force-mutable when the save target filename matches self.filename (preserves frombuffer() readonly buffer link). FYI - I don't see your mark_corners edits in my working copy of Image.py, so we appear to be in separate isolated checkouts, not a shared filesystem. No conflict on my end.
